MODULE: cosmos.integration.channels.whatsapp
FILE: cosmos/integration/channels/whatsapp.py (510 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos WhatsApp Channel Adapter
====================================

WhatsApp integration for the Cosmos swarm.

Features:
- Multi-device support via Baileys protocol
- QR code pairing
- Groups and broadcasts
- Media (images, videos, audio, documents)
- Voice messages
- Reactions
- Read receipts
- 

CLASSES:
- WhatsAppChannel(BaseChannel): WhatsApp channel adapter via Node.js bridge.

The bridge server (whatsapp-web.js
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def disconnect(self)
  Methods: async def send_message(self, chat_id: str, text: str, media_path: Optional[str]=None, reply_to: Opti
  Methods: async def send_reaction(self, chat_id: str, message_id: str, emoji: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def send_location(self, chat_id: str, latitude: float, longitude: float, description: str=None
  Methods: async def send_contact(self, chat_id: str, contact_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def get_chat_info(self, chat_id: str) -> Optional[Dict]
  Methods: async def get_contacts(self) -> List[Dict]
